title: Bug Case in Right Join
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->

```sql
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS t0;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS t1;
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 BLOB(66));
CREATE TABLE t1(c0 CHAR DEFAULT '*');
INSERT IGNORE INTO t0 VALUES ('0');

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM t1
NATURAL RIGHT JOIN t0
WHERE (NULL AND t0.c0) ^ (CASE WHEN t1.c0 THEN t0.c0 ELSE TRUE END);
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

TiDB should return 1 rather than 0.

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

```sql
-- MySQL 9.1.2
mysql> SELECT COUNT(*)
    -> FROM t1
    -> NATURAL RIGHT JOIN t0
    -> WHERE (NULL AND t0.c0) ^ (CASE WHEN t1.c0 THEN t0.c0 ELSE TRUE END);
+----------+
| COUNT(*) |
+----------+
|        1 |
+----------+
1 row in set (0.01 sec)

-- TiDB 8.5.0
mysql> SELECT COUNT(*)
    -> FROM t1
    -> NATURAL RIGHT JOIN t0
    -> WHERE (NULL AND t0.c0) ^ (CASE WHEN t1.c0 THEN t0.c0 ELSE TRUE END);
+----------+
| COUNT(*) |
+----------+
|        0 |
+----------+
1 row in set (0.00 sec)
```

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->

8.5
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c0 INT, c1 VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'default');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t2 LEFT JOIN t1 ON t2.c0 IS NULL OR t2.c1 = 'default';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t0 ON t1.c0 IS NOT NULL AND (t2.c0 = 1 OR t2.c0 IS NULL);
key_bug_features: NATURAL RIGHT JOIN with complex WHERE clause
